description.value: You posses the ability to construct weaves of such complexity and duration that they reshape the world in ways that persist long after you are gone.

system.benefits:
Once per long rest, you may perform a Grand Ritual (1 hour of uninterrupted preparation). This ritual produces effects impossible through normal casting:

  • Energy cost is reduced to one quarter (rounded up, minimum 1)
  • You may affect up to your Intelligence score in targets
  • You ignore all overspending penalties
  • The ritual weave automatically counts as having achieved 3 successes on the weaving roll (no roll required)

usage.text: Once per long rest; requires 1 hour of uninterrupted preparation
